learningTips.title: Set Weekly Learning Goals
learningTips.description: Plan small achievable goals every week and track your progress.

learningTips.title: Practice with Real Projects
learningTips.description: Apply concepts to projects so you remember and understand better.

learningTips.title: Use the Pomodoro Method
learningTips.description: Study in focused sessions with short breaks to avoid burnout.

learningTips.title: Revise Before New Lessons
learningTips.description: Quick revision improves retention and prepares your mind for new topics.

learningTips.title: Teach What You Learn
learningTips.description: Explaining concepts to others strengthens your understanding.

learningTips.title: Stay Consistent
learningTips.description: Learning a little every day is better than cramming occasionally.
